{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201617011516169436D359A7BA77"}"},"total":407},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7135799713441973004","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很好，文采很好。就是主角互动太少了。还有女主好像没有。基本都是训练。内容很丰富应该再添加点彩头就更好了！别除了训练就是训练。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1661432932,"group_id":"7057842926985939982","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"梦中梦醒梦中人，醉生醉死醉今生。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5eNEJE7EpEHvzE7I8eo/f3hD6u6wxzJwUG0UzOK64Y0","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/afc6a053268c4ce4b5c016591893b13f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537653&x-signature=EXlAgjJF3miBguwXfTF8COiXwuM%3D","user_id":"1961161742353047","user_name":"长空逍遥"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1961161742353047","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7057842926985939982","book_info":{"abstract":"叶峰穿越到特种兵世界，被派去当垃圾新兵连队的连长！
仅用三个月时间，就将这垃圾连队打造成了堪比特种部队的特战连！
团长：让你随便练练这些新兵，特么你全给我练成特种兵了？
狼牙：到底谁才是特种部队啊？
范天雷：求求你带着你的兵全部加入我狼牙吧！
何晨光：这辈子我墙都不服，就服叶教官！
冷锋：我才不加入战狼，我要降级去叶峰的野战部队！
从铁拳团新兵连开始，叶峰打造一支又一支部队，名扬全军。
